summary: All 5 architecture acceptance checks passed. Code implementation faithfully follows tech.md specification across all dimensions: layering, data model, API contracts, technology choices, and non-functional requirements.

items.title: 架构分层
items.reason: Controller only handles parameter binding and @Valid validation; Service contains all business logic (summary generation, tree building, cascade delete); Mapper extends BaseMapper for data access with custom SQL in XML.

items.title: 数据模型一致性
items.reason: schema.sql defines all 4 tables (category, tag, note, note_tag) with exact field names, types, indexes, and constraints matching tech.md. note table has idx_title, summary VARCHAR(200), FULLTEXT INDEX ft_note_title_content WITH PARSER ngram, and fk_note_category ON DELETE SET NULL.

items.title: API 实现一致性
items.reason: All API endpoints match tech.md spec: GET /api/notes with page/size/sort/order/tagId/categoryId params; POST/PUT/DELETE /api/notes/{id}; GET /api/notes/search?q= with static path priority over /{id}; GET /api/tags ordered by noteCount DESC; full CRUD for tags and categories; unified Result<T> response format with code/message/data.

items.title: 技术选型落地
items.reason: MyBatis-Plus with PaginationInnerInterceptor configured; FULLTEXT search uses MATCH AGAINST IN BOOLEAN MODE; marked.use(markedHighlight()) used instead of deprecated setOptions; DOMPurify.sanitize() applied before v-html rendering.

items.title: 非功能需求
items.reason: List APIs implement pagination with default 20 per page via MyBatis-Plus IPage; search uses database FULLTEXT index with ngram parser for Chinese support.
